title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding and trusted by The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and collaboration with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Perfect alignment across all dimensions: Head of RevOps role matches target position, 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech with $85M+ funding and $30M+ ARR scale matches expertise, Tel Aviv/NY hybrid covers preferred locations. Only minor gap: no explicit mention of AI-native GTM experience, but otherwise ideal candidate.
ai_opener: Omri, your track record scaling RevOps through hyper-growth B2B SaaS environments aligns perfectly with what Finout is building. With their $85M+ backing and enterprise logos like NYT and Wiz, they're at the inflection point where a seasoned Head of RevOps can architect the operational foundation for their next 3x ARR growth—and the Tel Aviv HQ + NY hybrid structure puts you in the right geography. Given your depth in Salesforce administration and pipeline forecasting at scale, I think this deserves a conversation.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Cyngn, an autonomous vehicle/robotics technology company, is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations to own GTM analytics and revenue systems. The role requires 8+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or similar GTM analytics roles in B2B SaaS or enterprise software. Candidates need strong data analytics, forecasting, and funnel modeling skills, CRM and BI tool proficiency, and the ability to translate business goals into scalable processes and dashboards. Cross-functional fluency across sales, marketing, finance, and product is essential, alongside strong executive communication.
score_reason: Exceptional match on all core competencies: 15+ years exceeds 8+ requirement, direct RevOps/GTM analytics expertise, proven B2B SaaS mastery, and demonstrated cross-functional leadership align perfectly with the role's demands. Remote US location meets global remote preference.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building GTM analytics and revenue systems that scale—from pipeline forecasting and funnel modeling to translating business goals into actionable dashboards across sales, marketing, and finance. Your Head of Revenue Operations role at Cyngn caught my attention because autonomous vehicle tech represents the frontier of enterprise software complexity, and I'm energized by the challenge of operationalizing GTM rigor in emerging, high-growth categories. I'd like to explore how my background can help you build the revenue infrastructure that scales with Cyngn's ambitions.
